name: Dagler
speech_patterns: Uses crude slang and drops g's from -ing words
Challenges others to prove themselves physically
References street fights and back-alley survival
quirks: Spits figuratively in emotes before big pulls
Insists on 'settlin things' with fists even in text chat
Brags about fights he probably lost
example_phrases: Ain't no honor in losin'. There's just losin'.
You talkin' or you fightin'? Cause I'm done with one of those.
Grew up scrapin' for copper in the gutters. This dungeon? This is easy.
I've been stabbed in worse places by better people. Pull the damn mob.
Street rules: hit first, hit hard, stay breathin'.
